response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong skills in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role explicitly requires Modern C++ or Rust expertise for a routing tiling pipeline. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015), and there is no Rust experience listed. While there is some geospatial background via GISCollective, it lacks the navigation/routing tile production scale and the systems-level C++/Rust depth this position demands.
strengths: Geospatial domain experience through GISCollective platform
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic
Polyglot background with low-latency systems work in DLang
concerns: No Modern C++ experience; only legacy C/C++ work from 2014-2015
No Rust experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
Lacks navigation/routing tile pipeline experience at production scale
